name: Cogent Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured bank offering comprehensive business and personal banking, lending, and wealth management services across 12 Florida locations with specialized industry expertise.
description_long:
Cogent Bank is a Florida-based FDIC-insured bank backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, operating multiple locations across the state including Bradenton, Clearwater, Fort Myers, Jacksonville, Lake Mary, Naples, Ocala, Orange City, Orlando, Sarasota, Tampa, and Winter Park. The bank positions itself as a full-service financial institution serving both business and personal clients with a focus on customized solutions and specialized industry expertise.

Cogent Bank offers a broad range of banking services divided into three main segments: Business Banking, Personal Banking, and Private Banking. Business clients can access business checking and deposit accounts, credit cards, digital banking, and various lending products including commercial real estate loans, SBA lending, USDA lending, business lines of credit, and term loans. The bank also provides specialty services such as association banking, international banking services, and treasury management. Personal banking customers have access to checking and savings accounts, tax-advantaged accounts, credit cards, digital banking, and residential lending options including conventional mortgages, FHA/VA/USDA mortgages, jumbo loans, construction-to-permanent mortgages, and self-directed IRA lending.

Cogent Bank distinguishes itself through deep industry specialization, offering targeted banking solutions for niche sectors including attorney and law firm banking, business aviation lending, cannabis business banking, government banking, healthcare banking, innovation and technology banking, national net lease finance, non-profit banking, sports and entertainment banking, and title company banking. The bank also provides extended FDIC coverage through IntraFi® deposits for both business and personal clients, uses a fraud protection approach emphasized as "Call. Verify. Send," and operates a private wealth advisory division (Cogent Private Wealth) for comprehensive financial planning and investment management.

Cogent Bank is best suited for business owners in specialized industries, high-net-worth individuals seeking private banking services, and customers valuing FDIC-insured deposits with personalized service. However, the bank's strength in specialized lending and business solutions means it may not offer the competitive rates or digital convenience of larger national banks or fintech alternatives. The involvement of non-FDIC-insured products through their private wealth division requires clients to understand the distinction between insured banking products and uninsured investment services. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal checking and savings accounts with tax-advantaged accounts
SBA lending for small business owners
Business lines of credit and term loans
Residential mortgage lending (conventional, FHA, VA, USDA, jumbo, construction-to-permanent)
Private banking and wealth management services through Cogent Private Wealth
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
IntraFi® partnership enabling extended FDIC coverage beyond standard limits for business and personal deposits
Specialized industry banking expertise across 15+ niche sectors including cannabis, healthcare, law firms, and aviation
12 physical branch locations across Florida for in-person banking and relationship management
Comprehensive lending options including SBA, USDA, commercial real estate, and self-directed IRA lending
Integrated private wealth advisory services through Cogent Private Wealth for comprehensive financial planning
Dedicated fraud protection protocols with verification procedures before fund transfers
cons: Limited geographic footprint restricted to Florida only with no national presence or online-only option
Private wealth advisory products are NOT FDIC-insured, NOT guaranteed by the bank, and MAY LOSE VALUE as explicitly stated on their website
No mention of competitive rate structures, APY rates, or fee schedules publicly available on website
Phone-based lost/stolen debit card reporting requires calling during business hours (407.545.2662) with after-hours emergency line required (1.800.500.1044)
best_for: Business owners in specialized industries (law firms, healthcare, aviation, non-profits, cannabis) seeking tailored banking solutions
High-net-worth individuals wanting integrated banking and private wealth advisory services through one institution
Customers prioritizing FDIC insurance and extended coverage through IntraFi® deposits over rate competitiveness
Commercial real estate investors and developers requiring construction-to-permanent financing and specialized lending
diagnosis: Cogent Bank is best for business owners in specialized industries and high-net-worth individuals seeking personalized banking with deep industry expertise and integrated wealth advisory services, particularly those operating in Florida. The primary caveat is the bank's Florida-only presence and reliance on relationship banking rather than digital-first services, plus the distinction between FDIC-insured banking products and non-insured investment products through their private wealth division.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
